description_long: This is a black, open-face helmet adorned with a series of metallic spikes running from the front to the back along the top, giving it a punk or biker aesthetic. The helmet's surface is heavily scratched and weathered, suggesting frequent use or intentional distressing for style. Multiple colorful decals and stickers are present, including a blue and yellow 'TRUE LOVE' patch, a stylized devil face, a white dove, graffiti-style text, a skull with radiating lines, and a large yellow and black crash test symbol. The interior is padded with dark cushioning for comfort and protection, and a brown chin strap with a metal buckle is visible for securing the helmet. The helmet lacks a visor and any visible ventilation openings. Its overall design is bold and expressive, likely appealing to urban riders or those seeking a rebellious look.
description: A black, spiked open-face helmet with heavy scratches, multiple bold decals, and a brown chin strap. The helmet features punk-inspired spikes and colorful graphic stickers, but no visor or vents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open face, interior padding, brown chin strap, and the 'TRUE LOVE' sticker on the left side.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlights the row of metallic spikes, 'TRUE LOVE' sticker, devil face, white dove, graffiti text, and part of the skull graphic.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full line of spikes, the devil face, skull with radiating lines, and the helmet's distressed surface.
description_view_3: Right-side view features the large yellow and black crash test symbol and the continuation of the spikes along the top.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features a distressed black base with multiple graphic stickers, including a blue and yellow 'TRUE LOVE' patch, a stylized devil face, a white dove, graffiti text, a skull with radiating lines, and a large yellow and black crash test symbol. The design is eclectic and punk-inspired, with metallic spikes accentuating the top.
